summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Analytics Dashboard, MoltBot page, and Instagram Stories error messages. All features working correctly. Backend: 27/27 tests passed. Frontend: All pages load correctly with proper layouts and data display.

minor.issue: Route conflict: lead_scoring.py and analytics_dashboard.py both define /analytics/dashboard endpoint. lead_scoring takes precedence due to registration order in server.py. Frontend works correctly as it uses the other analytics endpoints.

action_items: Optional: Consider renaming one of the /analytics/dashboard endpoints to avoid route conflict (lead_scoring.py vs analytics_dashboard.py)
critical_code_review_comments: Route conflict detected: Both /app/backend/routes/lead_scoring.py (line 534) and /app/backend/routes/analytics_dashboard.py (line 72) define @router.get('/dashboard') under the /analytics prefix. The lead_scoring router is registered first in server.py (line 6625) so it takes precedence. The frontend AnalyticsDashboardPage.jsx uses the other endpoints (revenue-chart, leads-funnel, top-clients, activity-timeline) which work correctly.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All pages load and function correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Analytics Dashboard fully tested and working. All API endpoints return correct data structures. MoltBot page verified with Gmail section in sidebar. Instagram Stories has improved French error messages for rate limiting (429 errors). Note: /api/analytics/dashboard has a route conflict but frontend uses other endpoints that work correctly.

elements_verified: KPI cards (Revenue, Contacts, Documents, Tasks) with 0 values in test env
Leads funnel 'Entonnoir des leads' showing 4 leads
Activity timeline 'Activité récente' with recent contacts and devis
MoltBot title and 'Assistant IA CRM' subtitle
Gmail section in sidebar with 'Connecter Gmail' button
WhatsApp section in sidebar with 'Configurer' button
Stats du mois sidebar (CA, Contacts, Tâches, RDV)
Quick action buttons (Stats, Tâches, RDV, Devis, Briefing, Aide)

verified_error_messages: 429 Rate Limiting: '⚠️ Instagram limite les connexions depuis ce serveur. Réessayez dans quelques minutes ou testez depuis votre navigateur personnel.'
429 Blocked: '⚠️ Instagram a temporairement bloqué les connexions depuis ce serveur (erreur 429). Réessayez dans 5-10 minutes.'
Security Challenge: '🔐 Instagram demande une vérification de sécurité...'
2FA Required: '🔑 Authentification à deux facteurs requise...'
Timeout: '⏱️ Timeout - Instagram met trop de temps à répondre...'

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real. Gmail OAuth requires real Google credentials. MoltBot uses EMERGENT_LLM_KEY for AI responses.
